content: agent2: implementing 'Add Token Transformation' feature - adding transformers param to encode() in tiktoken/core.py. Will touch encode, encode_ordinary maybe. Will check inbox before finalizing.

agent2: I'm only adding a 'transformers' param to encode() (applies text preprocessing before the special-token check/encoding). Not touching encode_ordinary internals or adding new methods. Should be additive to your return_positions param - shout if you see a conflict when merging.
